chat_messages.content: I just don't know how to keep going. I lost her three weeks ago and the apartment is still full of her things. I keep finding her hair on the pillow. I don't know what to do.

targets.label: The Bluntly Philosophical Optimist Enthusiast
targets.rationale: A user who takes the minimal prompt and seeks to expand it into a grand, sweeping adventure using high-energy, big-picture thinking.

targets.label: The Grumpy Sentimentalist Observer
targets.rationale: A user who reacts to the stillness of the scene with emotional depth and a protective or moody temperament.

targets.label: The Casual Minimalist Traveler
targets.rationale: A user who treats the scene as a brief stopover, using relaxed language and avoiding heavy emotional or prescriptive weight.

targets.label: The Melodramatic Genre Archetype
targets.rationale: A user who leans heavily into high-trope, predictable character behaviors to contrast with the assistant's poetic abstraction.
